name: SpyWatch Public Intelligence Case Timeline
safety: Educational public-source timeline. No live tracking, private addresses, private contact data, or copied personal photos.

events.title: Buryakov prior South Africa period noted in DOJ release
events.summary: The DOJ sentencing release says Buryakov previously worked in South Africa before the New York case period.

events.title: DOJ announces arrests in Operation Ghost Stories
events.summary: DOJ announced charges after a multi-year FBI investigation into alleged Russian illegals in the United States.

events.title: Vienna prisoner exchange follows pleas
events.summary: The 2010 case moved into a high-profile exchange after guilty pleas.

events.title: FBI publishes Operation Ghost Stories educational materials
events.summary: The FBI released photos, video clips, and documents through FOIA-related public material.

events.title: Buryakov case becomes public
events.summary: Public records identified an SVR New York case involving economic-intelligence collection and non-official cover.

events.title: Buryakov sentenced
events.summary: Buryakov was sentenced in Manhattan federal court to 30 months in prison and ordered removed from the United States after completion of sentence.

events.title: Maria Adela reportedly leaves Naples for Moscow
events.summary: The user-provided transcript and public reporting describe Maria Adela leaving Naples for Moscow shortly after GRU passport-range reporting became public.

events.title: Dutch authorities disclose ICC access attempt
events.summary: Public reporting described the attempted entry into the International Criminal Court under a Brazilian identity.

events.title: Maria Adela / Olga Kolobova investigation published
events.summary: Bellingcat and partners published the public investigation linking the Naples socialite legend to Olga Kolobova.

events.title: Slovenia sentencing and exchange context
events.summary: Public reporting described the Slovenian guilty pleas shortly before the 2024 exchange.

events.title: Unit 29155 cyber public naming wave
events.summary: CISA, DOJ, and Rewards for Justice publicly linked named GRU Unit 29155 officers to cyber activity involving WhisperGate and critical infrastructure targeting.
